calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH SACRAMENTO FOR PLAINTIFF HELENA GALTOLO
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ORA PROCHOVNICK FOR DEFENDANT KERI W WEST

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACE ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $3239.32 (RENT FROM 4/1/05 - 7/31/05) ON OR BEFORE 7/11/05 BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER TO GAETANI REALTY AT 4444 GEARY BLVD RM 205.
IF TIMELY PAID, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY, PLAINTIFF AFTER 24 HOUR NOTICE TO DEFENDANT, MAY FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1651 MARKET STREET, #307 AND ANY MONEY DUE. NO FURTHER STAYS ALLOWED. DEFENDANT AGREES THAT NO OTHER ADULT IS IN POSSESSION; RELEASES PLAINTIFF FROM ANY AND ALL CLAIMS; AND STIPULATION BINDS ALL HEIRS.
MR. SACRAMENTO HAS AUTHORITY FROM PLAINITFF AND AGENT TO ENTER INTO THIS AGREEMENT.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA(218)
